{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Sunsail frigates
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sunsail frigates]] are ships with bronze bottoms and shimmering solar sails.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24">''The Captain'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sunsail ships are propelled by [[Skimmer Drives]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
